mapper.insert: INSERT INTO guide (game_id, category_id, title, content, view_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{gameId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE guide SET game_id = #{gameId}, category_id = #{categoryId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT g.id, g.game_id, gm.name AS game_name, g.category_id, c.name AS category_name, g.title, g.content, g.view_count, g.created_at, g.updated_at FROM guide g LEFT JOIN game gm ON g.game_id = gm.id LEFT JOIN category c ON g.category_id = c.id WHERE g.id = #{id}

SELECT g.id, g.game_id, gm.name AS game_name, g.category_id, c.name AS category_name, g.title, g.content, g.view_count, g.created_at, g.updated_at FROM guide g LEFT JOIN game gm ON g.game_id = gm.id LEFT JOIN category c ON g.category_id = c.id ORDER BY g.created_at DESC

SELECT g.id, g.game_id, gm.name AS game_name, g.category_id, c.name AS category_name, g.title, g.content, g.view_count, g.created_at, g.updated_at FROM guide g LEFT JOIN game gm ON g.game_id = gm.id LEFT JOIN category c ON g.category_id = c.id WHERE g.title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR g.content ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY g.created_at DESC
